'''Alijah Orr''' was an [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] Officer during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was regarded as the second most powerful man in the [[Shesharile system/Legends|Shesharile system]], after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]]. Orr sought to advance in his position by eradicating [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] in his system, and was focused on capturing [[Shamus Falconi]], a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]].<ref name="AJ9" />
